events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition and defect cues. Scenario: commercial project, flanged joints, no torque marks/witness lines, rough-complete. Reference ASME PCC-1 (guidelines for pressure boundary bolted flange joint assembly) and B16.5 (pipe flanges). No torque marks/witness lines means bolts may not have been properly torqued/verified; cannot confirm proper preload. This is non-compliant/defective. Decision fail because non-compliant and high risk? Need assess risk. Flanged joint without torque witness marks means no evidence of required bolting procedure; potential leak under pressure, especially if pressure piping. Commercial project, third-party inspections. Could be high risk. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: missing torque marks/witness lines on flange bolts; no visual evidence of proper bolt tension/torque sequence. Actions: verify torque with calibrated wrench per ASME PCC-1 Appendix E, mark witness lines after proper torquing, document bolt tension. Rationale: ASME PCC-1 requires controlled bolting and documentation/witness marks; absence indicates unverified assembly. References: ASME PCC-1, ASME B16.5. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list. workable empty list. Need ensure JSON valid.

  "rationale": "ASME PCC-1 requires controlled bolting of flanged joints with verification and typically witness marks to confirm proper preload. Absence of torque marks on a roughed-in flanged joint means the assembly cannot be confirmed as compliant, creating leak and pressure-boundary risk.",

  ]
